header.title: Diabetes Diet Guide
header.subtitle: Monitor glucose and master the plate method

alert.title: Low Blood Sugar Warning
alert.desc: Your reading indicates hypoglycemia (low blood sugar). Please take action immediately:

actions.carbs: Consume 15g of fast-acting carbs (e.g., 4oz juice, 3-4 glucose tabs)
actions.repeat: Test again; if still low, repeat treatment
actions.contact: Contact your doctor if levels don't stabilize

log.title: Log Glucose Reading
log.mealContextPlaceholder: What did you eat? How do you feel?

intro.title: The Diabetes Plate Method
intro.desc: The Plate Method is a simple way to plan meals without counting. It focuses on portion control and balance to help manage blood sugar levels.

build.title: Build Your Plate
build.hint: Click a section to see recommended foods

veggies.name: Non-Starchy Veggies
veggies.desc: Fill half your plate with colorful, fiber-rich vegetables

protein.name: Lean Protein
protein.desc: Fill a quarter with lean protein sources

carbs.name: Healthy Carbs
carbs.desc: Fill a quarter with whole grains or starchy veggies

veggies.title: Veggies First
veggies.desc: Eat your vegetables first to slow down the absorption of glucose from the rest of your meal.

protein.title: Quality Protein
protein.desc: Choose lean options to support muscle maintenance without excessive saturated fats.

carbs.title: Mindful Carbs
carbs.desc: Stick to complex carbohydrates that have a lower impact on blood sugar spikes.

intro.title: Glycemic Index (GI) Lookup
intro.desc: The Glycemic Index ranks carbohydrates by how much they raise blood glucose levels compared to a reference food.

gi.search: Search for a food (e.g. oats, banana...)
gi.noResults: No foods found matching your search
